[Part lIl—Sec. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th Octaber, 1999 G.S.R. 719(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) read with clauses (c), (¢), (f) and (g) of sub-section (2) of section 30 of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989 namely :-— 1. a) These Rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 1999. (ii) They shalt come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Rule 41 of the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989 shall be omitted. [No. 89/TC(RCT)/1-3] PADMAKSHI RAHBEJA, Executive Director, Public Grievances Note.—The principal rulcs were published in the Gazette of India vide GSR 842(E) dated 19-9-1989 and subsequently amended by GSR 700(E) dated 26-11-1991, GSR 438(E) dated 21-4-1992, GSR 509(E) dated 15-6-1994, GSR 270(E) dated 4-7-1996 and GSR 59(E) dated 4-2-1997. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Dolhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
